message:
chore(beads): close eigvalsh / det / inv / solve python wrapper beads

Mark three completed numpy.linalg python-wrapper parity beads as
closed with pointers to the commits that delivered them, so br ready
stops surfacing them as open work and the audit trail links the
issues to the landed code.

- franken_numpy-2k5n: numpy.linalg: eigvalsh python wrapper parity
  → closed, implemented in 3c2f6cc.
- franken_numpy-m733: numpy.linalg: det/inv python wrapper parity
  → closed, implemented in 483c91f.
- franken_numpy-n795: numpy.linalg: solve python wrapper parity
  → closed, implemented in 4004a4d.

Pure issue-tracker bookkeeping — no source code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
